title: TpmRc implements Eq but not Hash
description: wolftpm/src/error.rs:19: TpmRc derives Debug,Clone,Copy,PartialEq,Eq but not Hash. A type that implements Eq should almost always also implement Hash, because callers will naturally want to use it in HashSet<TpmRc> or HashMap<TpmRc, ...> (e.g., to deduplicate or count error codes). Omitting Hash forces callers to use BTreeSet (requiring Ord) or wrap in a newtype. Since TpmRc wraps a u32, Hash is trivially derived: add Hash to the derive list. Also add Hash to wolftpm-tss::Error for the same reason — the tss error enum contains only u8/usize/i32/u32/&'static str, all of which are Hash.
